name: (21)     Fettuccine with Gorgonzola
method: Wash spinach and shake to remove excess water. Cook spinach in the water clinging to the leaves; drain and chop.
In a saucepan, bring cream to a simmer. Add Gorgonzola cheese, butter and vodka. Blend; add salt and pepper to
taste. Add spinach and ricotta; simmer and stir until blended.
Cook noodles according to package directions; drain. Pour sauce over noodles and toss to coat. Sprinkle with
Parmesan cheese and toss again. Serve immediately.
This is a simple yet mouth-watering Italian recipe that can be made by anyone. Have the kids help make it while
you take care of the sauce or do it all in one go with ease, giving the kids a break to play at some point. This simple
yet flavorful dish requires just three main ingredients: linguine, eggs, and bacon.
